overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in an armored spacesuit exploring a compact, industrial living quarters bathed in red emergency lighting. The character walks through the cluttered room, examines a safety protocol poster on the wall, and proceeds toward an exit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: compact industrial crew quarters with work station and storage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow quarters, observing the cluttered work area and equipment lockers

entered.detail: cluttered desk with electronic equipment and tools against the right wall
red metal folding chair positioned in front of the workbench
large red warning poster with 'Safety Protocol' text and figure in protective suit
tall metal cabinet with multiple compartments against the left wall
industrial metal shelving mounted on the right wall holding various containers
dark colored sofa or seating bench beneath the safety poster

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a spacesuited character walking through a narrow, industrial living space with red emergency lighting. The room features a workbench with equipment on the right, storage lockers on the left, and a safety poster visible on the far wall above a worn couch.

scene_state.functional_zone: seating area with safety poster and bunk bed

events.description: character stops walking and turns to face the safety poster on the wall

agents.ego_description: standing before the safety poster, examining the warning instructions and artwork in detail

entered.detail: sleeping quarters with red blanket visible in the corner of the room
illuminated doorway leading to an adjacent corridor or room

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the back wall and turns to examine the safety poster up close. The worn couch becomes more prominent in the frame, and a bunk bed becomes visible in the corner as the camera angle shifts. The red lighting casts dramatic shadows across the industrial surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: sleeping area with bunk bed and exit corridor

events.description: character turns away from poster and walks toward the illuminated exit doorway

agents.ego_description: turning from the poster and walking toward the doorway leading out of the quarters

entered.detail: stacked storage containers near the doorway
wall-mounted air circulation system near the exit

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the poster and walks toward the exit doorway, passing by the bunk bed now visible on the right side. The camera follows as the character approaches the illuminated doorway at the back of the compact quarters, with storage crates visible near the threshold.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cramped industrial living space that shifts from a general survey of the room to a focused examination of its details before heading toward an exit. It begins by following a spacesuited character through a narrow area bathed in red emergency lighting, passing a workbench and storage lockers. As the character approaches the back wall, the camera closes in to examine a safety poster, bringing a worn couch and a corner bunk bed into sharper focus amidst dramatic shadows. The scene then shifts as the character moves away from the wall, passing the bunk bed on the right while heading toward the back of the quarters. Finally, the camera follows the character toward an illuminated doorway, passing storage crates positioned near the threshold.
